app.areyoucurrentlywithoutajobhavesparet: Through our platform LIBAXIS, our AI recruiter meticulously searches for optimal matches. The platform provides comprehensive assessments of both hard and soft skills, along with quantified match scores, between potential talents and available positions, ranging from full-time roles, part-time engagements to internships. This thorough process aims to accurately determine the extent to which someone is suitable for a specific vacancy while identifying areas for potential improvement.Selected candidates are offered the opportunity for targeted training to address identified skill gaps. This continuous learning approach enables individuals to consistently enhance their qualifications, preparing for sustained career growth and job security. Upon the establishment of a suitable match, you will personally receive a message from one of our recruiters. Soon, we will introduce a portal accessible to both talents and clients, where you can independently manage all your affairs. This includes receiving notifications when a match is made.
app.wewillhelpyouwithallyourquestionstoc: We assist you with all your inquiries through our online Helpcenter.
app.isyourcompanyinneedofadditionalproje: Through our platform LIBAXIS, optimal matches are sought for projects that we can assign to your organization. This thorough process aims to accurately determine the extent to which your company is suitable for specific assignments, while also increasing your revenue. For more information, please refer to our online Helpcenter.
app.networkingisthemostimportantlinktoge: Is your company seeking additional projects, exploring supplementary revenue streams, or aiming to expand your network? Alternatively, are you facing staffing shortages, grappling with manpower limitations for a sizable project, or in search of specific experts? At Selection to Work, we provide solutions to these challenges! You can register and our team will guide you through the onboarding steps.

Exploring Opportunities: Connecting for Now and Beyond. At Selection to Work, we comprehend the immeasurable value of networking for present and future opportunities. Our platform, LIBAXIS, connects businesses and professionals, fostering meaningful interactions. What sets us apart? We specialize in curating the perfect match between job vacancies and professionals. Just fill out our form, and we'll identify the right company for you. And it's all free of charge. Effortlessly stay updated on fitting career prospects. You maintain full control over your career. Why not try it out on a non-binding basis and experience the advantages firsthand? Whether you're job hunting, aiming to use your spare time productively, or looking to supplement your income, Selection to Work offers the solution. Our extensive partnerships have crafted a robust network, addressing challenges like workload and staffing shortages. Our professionals harness their expertise while employers fulfill their needs.
